% Auto-generated by make_appendix_tables.py — do not hand-edit.
\begin{table}[t]
\caption{Spectral-fit configuration and quality control of the production cumulant estimator (Sect.~3.2), read from the fitting source code. The polynomial orders follow the per-band slant-optical-depth dynamic range; the no-presmoothing fit is the production variant.}
\label{tab:fit-config}
\footnotesize
\begin{tabular}{lp{0.62\linewidth}}
\tophline
Component & Setting \\
\middlehline
\multicolumn{2}{l}{\textit{Spectral windows and inputs}} \\
Bands & O$_2$A, WCO$_2$, SCO$_2$ (all three fitted independently) \\
Transmittance & measured radiance / per-sounding TOA solar irradiance \\
Solar irradiance & high-resolution solar line list, evaluated in the solar rest frame (per-sounding Doppler chain: atmosphere $\to$ instrument $\to$ solar frame) \\
Channel ordinate & channel slant optical depth (SOD) from the meteorology-driven gas absorption computed per sounding \\
\middlehline
\multicolumn{2}{l}{\textit{Estimator}} \\
Polynomial order & 7 / 3 / 7 (O$_2$A / WCO$_2$ / SCO$_2$) in SOD, fitted to $\ln T$ \\
Solver & exact linear least squares (SVD); bounded BVLS fallback where the unbounded solution violates the sign bounds \\
Presmoothing & none (production); a Savitzky--Golay twin fit (window 51 channels, order 3) is retained as a robustness variant (Fig.~A2) \\
\middlehline
\multicolumn{2}{l}{\textit{Quality control}} \\
Channel mask & channels with unphysical transmittance ($T>1$) or non-finite $\ln T$/SOD are dropped \\
Minimum channels & fit skipped when fewer than (order$+$2) valid channels remain in a band \\
Post-fit masks & non-positive fitted var($l'$) invalidates the gamma-shape diagnostics; unphysical retrieved XCO$_2$ ($\le 0$) is masked before analysis \\
\bottomhline
\end{tabular}
\end{table}
